title: Whisked Ethiopian Peanut Stir-fry
description: A fresh and dense one-pot dish featuring halal-friendly peanut oil and a whisked sauce that combines with tender vegetables and nuts for a quick, easy meal.

ingredients.name: 2 cups mixed fresh vegetables (such as kale, spinach, and chard), chopped

instructions: Heat the peanut oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Add the onion and garlic; cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Stir in the carrot, bell pepper, and baby corns. Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes.
Pour in the tomato paste, salt, and red pepper flakes (if using). Stir to combine well.
Gradually pour in the water while continuously stirring until you have a thick sauce. Reduce heat to low and let it simmer for about 5 minutes or until vegetables are tender.
Stir in the mixed fresh vegetables. Cook for another 2-3 minutes, until all ingredients are heated through.
